LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS BRUGNARA PROPERTIES I, LP, BRUGNARA CORPORATION, AND BRUGNARA PROPERTIES VI'S MOTION TO ENJOIN DEFENDANTS PENDING NON-JUDICIAL FORECLOSURES. ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR HEARING ON PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO ENJOIN DEFENDANTS' PENDING NONJUDICIAL FORECLOSURES (TO BE SET FOR 12/14/07)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS BRUGNARA PROPERTIES I, L.P., BRUGNARA CORPORATION, BRUGNARA PROPERTIES, VI'S MOTION TO ENJOIN DEFENDANTS' PENDING NON-JUDICIAL FORECLOSURES CONTINUED FROM DEC-14-2007 TO LAW AND MOTION AT DEC-21-2007, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 21, 2007. SALE DATE REMAINS ON DECEMBER 24, 2007. THE DECEMBER 14, 2007 TENTATIVE RULING WILL REMAIN. IT APPEARS THAT NOTICE OF SALE HAS BEEN GIVEN. IT IS UNDISPUTED THAT PLAINTIFF IS IN DEFAULT AND THAT DEFENDANT HAS A SECURED INTEREST. ALTHOUGH THERE MAY BE AN AMOUNT IN DISPUTE, THAT IS A SMALL PORTION OF THE DEBT. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS IT CANNOT AFFORD A BOND AND HAS NOT TENDERED THE AMOUNT DUE. IT APPEARS THE EQUITIES FAVOR ALLOWING THE SALE TO PROCEED AND DIRECTING THAT THE SUMS IN DISPUTE BE PLACED WITH THE COURT PENDING A DETERMINATION OF THAT ISSUE. COUNSEL WAIVE THE SUBMISSION OF AN ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
